name: luis
notes: Cleanup overlay for SN92. The live Tensorclaw website identifies Tensorclaw Network as Bittensor Mainnet Subnet 92. Tensorplex and the website currently list https://github.com/tensorclaw/tensorclaw, but that repository returns 404, so it is intentionally not promoted as a curated source surface.

gap_notes: Previously discovered Tensorclaw source repository currently returns 404.

No verified standalone static data artifact yet.
